chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1001 of 2023 SCRA 1002 of 2023 SCRA 1003 of 2023 SCRA 1004 of 2023 SCRA 1005 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.14, 20 & 22. 2. For orders on CMA No.1694/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 19.09.2025 Mr. Zakir Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Faheem, advocate for the applicant. These reference applications are pending since 2023 and even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today, Mr. Zakir Ali, advocate holds brief for counsel for the applicant and merely seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant, Collectorate of Customs Appraisement (East) Karachi, is not interested in proceeding with these matters, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
